summary: A WhatsApp-like messaging app with real-time chat functionality.
architectural_notes: Messaging app inspired by WhatsApp — focus on real-time chat UX
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Modern minimal chat bubble icon with a teal/green gradient, two overlapping rounded speech bubbles, clean flat design on a transparent background (chatflow-logo.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Build a contacts/user list panel on the left side of the app. Display all registered users with their avatar (initials-based placeholder), username, and last message preview. Highlight the currently active conversation.

Build a main chat conversation view that displays messages as chat bubbles. Sent messages appear on the right in a distinct color; received messages appear on the left. Each bubble shows the message text and a formatted timestamp.
Add a message input bar at the bottom of the chat view with a text field and a send button. Submitting the form (Enter key or send button) calls the backend to store and display the new message.

Display an online/offline status indicator next to each user in the contacts panel and in the chat header. Users who have been active recently are shown as online (green dot); others as offline (grey dot).

Apply a clean, modern messaging-app visual theme. Use a dark sidebar with teal/green accent colors for sent message bubbles (inspired by WhatsApp's signature palette), a light main chat area, rounded chat bubbles, and clear typographic hierarchy. Enforce the style consistently across all views.
Add a top header bar in the chat view showing the recipient's avatar, username, and online status. Include a search icon as a placeholder for future search functionality.

Integrate Internet Identity authentication so users can securely log in and log out of the app. The login page should present a 'Login with Internet Identity' button that triggers the II authentication flow. After successful authentication, the user should be directed to the main messaging layout (or profile setup if first time). Unauthenticated users should only see the login page.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a backend actor that manages users, conversations, and messages. Support registering a user profile (username, avatar placeholder, status), storing conversations between users, and persisting chat messages with sender ID, text content, and timestamp.
User authentication with Internet Identity for secure login
Add a logo to the app (branding/visual identity)

Generate a ChatFlow app logo and display it on the login page above the app name. The logo should be a modern, minimal chat/messaging icon using teal/green accent colors consistent with the app's WhatsApp-inspired palette.
